description_long: This is a rectangular, countertop microwave oven with a matte dark gray exterior. The front features a large, rectangular glass window set within a black frame, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber. To the right of the window is a vertical control panel with several horizontal buttons and a prominent circular dial, all integrated into the same dark gray surface. The body is boxy and solid, with no visible seams or joints on the sides, top, or back, giving it a monolithic appearance. The door handle is subtly integrated along the right edge of the door, blending with the overall design. No visible vents, branding, or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A matte dark gray microwave with a large front glass window, integrated control panel, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large glass window, black frame, and the vertical control panel with buttons and a dial on the right.
description_view_1: The right side view displays a plain, solid dark gray surface with the circular dial slightly protruding near the front.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a featureless, flat dark gray surface with no visible openings or details.
description_view_3: The left side view is a plain, uninterrupted dark gray surface with no visible features.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring four horizontal rectangular buttons stacked above a large circular dial. There is no visible labeling or digital display.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical strip integrated along the right edge of the door, flush with the surface, and made of the same dark gray material as the body.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any surface of the object.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and framed in black.
